_comment: Reference MCP registration for Claude Desktop. Copy into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (Windows), then replace the bearer token and URL placeholders. Claude Desktop is stdio-only in shipped versions at time of writing, so the mcp-remote bridge (npx @modelcontextprotocol/mcp-remote) wraps Loom's HTTP MCP endpoint into stdio. Remove the NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED env line once you have a real cert; it is there only to tolerate the self-signed cert Caddy generates for localhost. The Loom server hardcodes ingestion_mode=live_mcp_capture on every loom_learn call from this transport.
